description: On the Kanban board, I need a super lightweight way to delete multiple to-do items at once. I want to be able to select cards and then press delete, or the other option is I want to be able to drag and drop cards onto a trash can.
title: Add bulk delete for Kanban cards with selection

descriptionHistory.description: On the Kanban board, I need a super lightweight way to delete multiple to-do items at once. I want to be able to select cards and then press delete, or the other option is I want to be able to drag and drop cards onto a trash can.

summary:
## Summary: Multi-select bulk delete for Kanban cards

### Changes Implemented
- Added multi-select card functionality via Ctrl/Cmd+click and checkbox UI
- Added keyboard shortcuts: Delete/Backspace to delete selected cards, Escape to clear selection
- Added floating selection toolbar showing count with Delete and Clear buttons
- Enhanced drag-to-trash to delete all selected cards when dragging a selected card
- Updated TrashDropZone to display selected card count during drag
- Added `useDeleteCards` bulk delete hook that fires parallel DELETE requests
- Cards show blue ring highlight and filled checkbox when selected
- Checkboxes appear on hover (hidden by default) and stay visible when any card is selected

### Files Modified
- `lib/hooks/useCards.ts` — Added `useDeleteCards` bulk mutation hook
- `components/board/Card.tsx` — Added `isSelected`, `hasSelection`, `onSelect` props; checkbox UI; Ctrl+click handler; selected visual state
- `components/board/Column.tsx` — Added `selectedCardIds` and `onSelectCard` props; passes them through to Card components
- `components/board/TrashDropZone.tsx` — Added `selectedCount` prop; dynamic label showing card count
- `components/board/KanbanBoard.tsx` — Added `selectedCardIds` state; keyboard handlers (Delete, Escape); `handleSelectCard` callback; bulk drag-to-delete logic; floating selection toolbar; wired all selection props to columns

### Notes for Developer
- Selection uses Ctrl+Click (Windows) / Cmd+Click (Mac) to match standard OS conventions
- Bulk delete fires parallel DELETE requests to the existing `/api/v1/cards/{id}` endpoint — no new API route needed
- All deletes show a confirmation dialog before proceeding
- The floating toolbar only appears when cards are selected and no drag is active (to avoid clashing with the TrashDropZone)
